features: 🌸 White Jasmine Scent – A fresh, floral fragrance inspired by nature’s harmony
🚫 Eliminates Odours, Not Masks – With Febreze’s advanced OdourClear formula
🛋️ Perfect for Soft Surfaces – Use on curtains, sofas, carpets, bedding, clothing & more
💧 Light Mist Formula – Safe for daily use; dries quickly without residue
📦 2 x 375ml Pack – Ideal bundle for regular fabric freshness across your home
description: Product description Bring the calming essence of nature into your home with Febreze Fabric Refresher White Jasmine . This 2 x 375ml twin pack is designed to eliminate odours from your soft furnishings, leaving behind a delicate floral fragrance inspired by the purity of white jasmine blooms. Formulated with OdourClear technology , Febreze doesn’t just mask smells—it truly neutralises them, helping you keep fabrics like curtains, cushions, bedding, and clothing fresh every day. The ultra-fine mist dries quickly without leaving any residue, making it safe and effective for daily use. White Jasmine Fragrance – A soft, floral scent inspired by fresh jasmine blossoms Powerful Odour Elimination – Targets and removes odours with OdourClear technology Versatile Use – Ideal for upholstery, curtains, carpets, bedding, and clothing Quick-Dry Mist – Leaves fabrics fresh with no dampness or residue 2 x 375ml Bottles – Great value twin pack for long-lasting freshness Ingredients Water based formula
